extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings by direction and category. I counted only the “Against” rows: criminal proceedings are Nil against the Company, Subsidiaries, Promoters and Directors, giving 0; statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil in all Against rows, giving 0; tax proceedings are 1 against the Company and 1 against the Subsidiaries, giving 2. I excluded all “By” rows, including 2 criminal proceedings by Promoters and 1 by Directors. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹0.92 million plus ₹28.62 million, or ₹29.54 million = ₹2.954 crore; promoter and director amounts were excluded. Contingent liabilities are explicitly stated as not disclosed as of September 30, 2024, so the stated nil figure is used as ₹0.0 crore. Customer concentration is company-wide and based on revenue from operations for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024: top five customers contributed 96.80% and top ten customers 99.45%. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion is ₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore.
